modbus_rtu_client_begin.message0: Initialize Modbus RTU client baud rate%1
modbus_rtu_client_begin.tooltip: Initialize Modbus RTU client and set baud rate

modbus_rtu_server_begin.message0: Initialize Modbus RTU server Device ID%1Baud rate%2
modbus_rtu_server_begin.tooltip: Initialize Modbus RTU server, set device ID and baud rate

modbus_tcp_client_begin.tooltip: Initialize the Modbus TCP client and connect to the specified IP and port

modbus_tcp_server_begin.message0: Initialize Modbus TCP server device ID%1

modbus_coil_read.tooltip: Read the coil status of the specified address and return 0 or 1, or -1 if failed.

modbus_coil_write.tooltip: Writes the coil value (0 or 1) to the specified address

modbus_discrete_input_read.message0: Read discrete input device ID%1 address%2
modbus_discrete_input_read.tooltip: Read the discrete input status of the specified address, returning 0 or 1, or -1 on failure.

modbus_holding_register_read.message0: Read holding register device ID%1 address%2
modbus_holding_register_read.tooltip: Read the holding register value at the specified address, and return -1 on failure

modbus_holding_register_write.message0: Write holding register device ID%1 address%2 value%3
modbus_holding_register_write.tooltip: Write the holding register value (0-65535) to the specified address

modbus_input_register_read.message0: Read input register device ID%1 address%2
modbus_input_register_read.tooltip: Read the input register value at the specified address, and return -1 on failure

modbus_server_configure_coils.message0: Configure server coil starting address %1 quantity %2
modbus_server_configure_coils.tooltip: Configure the coil address range of the Modbus server

modbus_server_configure_discrete_inputs.message0: Configure server discrete input starting address %1 quantity %2
modbus_server_configure_discrete_inputs.tooltip: Configuring the discrete input address range of the Modbus server

modbus_server_configure_holding_register.message0: Configuration server holding register starting address %1 quantity %2
modbus_server_configure_holding_register.tooltip: Configure the holding register address range of the Modbus server

modbus_server_configure_input_registers.message0: Configure server input register starting address %1 quantity %2
modbus_server_configure_input_registers.tooltip: Configure the input register address range of the Modbus server

modbus_server_poll.tooltip: Poll the Modbus server to see if there is a request, and return true if there is a request.

modbus_server_coil_read.message0: The server reads the coil address %1
modbus_server_coil_read.tooltip: Read the current value of the server coil

modbus_server_coil_write.message0: The server writes to the coil address %1 value %2
modbus_server_coil_write.tooltip: Set the value of the server coil

modbus_server_discrete_input_write.message0: The server writes discrete input address %1 value %2
modbus_server_discrete_input_write.tooltip: Sets the value of a server discrete input

modbus_server_holding_register_read.message0: The server reads the holding register address %1
modbus_server_holding_register_read.tooltip: Read the current value of the server holding register

modbus_server_holding_register_write.message0: The server writes to the holding register address %1 value %2
modbus_server_holding_register_write.tooltip: Set the value of the server holding register

modbus_server_input_register_write.message0: The server writes to the input register address %1 value %2
modbus_server_input_register_write.tooltip: Set the value of the server input register

modbus_last_error.message0: Get the last Modbus error message
modbus_last_error.tooltip: Get the error message of the last Modbus operation

modbus_quick_coil_control.message0: Modbus fast control coil device ID%1 address%2 value%3
modbus_quick_coil_control.tooltip: Quickly control the coils of Modbus devices and automatically handle initialization

modbus_quick_register_read.message0: Modbus fast read register device ID%1 address%2
modbus_quick_register_read.tooltip: Quickly read the holding register value of Modbus device
